header.title: Custom software and SaaS-style products for real operations
header.subtitle: We run our own products in production, not just client projects. That means we've dealt with uptime, permissions, billing, and admin headaches firsthand, not just in theory.

items.title: SaaS & customer-facing products
items.text: Subscription apps, portals, and multi-tenant systems, with the auth, roles, and admin tools they actually need.

items.title: Business platforms
items.text: Internal and external platforms built around how your team actually works: approvals, roles, permissions.

items.title: Dashboards & data tools
items.text: One reliable view of the business instead of ten spreadsheets, so decisions take minutes, not meetings.

items.title: Integrations & automation
items.text: Integrations that don't break, and automation that cuts out manual work, errors, and the 'wait, who changed this?' Slack threads.
